description: None guard removed before attribute access; raises AttributeError when user is None.
diff:
diff --git a/auth.py b/auth.py
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -1,4 +1,2 @@
 def get_username(user):
-    if user is not None:
-        return user.name
-    return "anonymous"
+    return user.name
